Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The hotel is very large with many large groups so it can be a bit noisy although probably for this reason an excellent place to stay if traveling with lots of family At 19 euros the buffet breakfast was rather pricey but we appreciated the cafe with smaller less expensive options   The bed was very large and comfortable even though we were staying in the most basic room Would have loved to have had a coffee maker or hot water boiler in the room but very much appreciated the wine glasses and mini fridge

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: What I didn t like was of a personal preference I like a face cloth there were none The temperature could be a little cooler I prefer a cold room I also like a top sheet rather than a comforter I think you are a pet friendly hotel which is a problem for me as I am allergic to pets and sneezed the whole time I was in the room There is a no smoking policy for those who don t like the smell of cigarettes what about those of us who have health issues from pets I was hoping I could manage this as I was part of a group travelling for a family reunion but know from now on that I cannot put myself in this situation Again the hotel is lovely but this was why it didn t receive top marks from me   The gentleman at the desk through the night was so very helpful to us He is a blessing to your hotel The pillows are indeed very nice It is a clean and lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Room was to noise traffic through the window was to loud And room was connected with another room only with doors and I was wake from 6 am because some asian family Never more   Breakfast was very good

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The staff seemed to dissmiss us quickly wasn t very helpful with any of our questions   Beautiful hotel with exellent view Next to Sch nbrunn Palace and the zoo Relatively easy access to the city centre

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Grumpy lady at the check in Think she needs a vacation Asked if we could have an extra bed in the room and she sighed and said the rooms were too small even if we could easily have fitted four extra beds in the room   Large rooms

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: I had booked a comfort double room but on arrival the clerk at the desk gave us a smaller room on the 1st floor not a bad room all in all but with a very small bathroom not what I had booked I returned to the front desk and showed them photos of the room from my booking com account on my phone The new room I was given no extra charge of course was the one in the photo however the photos on the web site are masterfully taken In reality the room is spacious but if you pay attention to the details it s 3 stars at best All in all the rooms are quite OK but not as luxurious as the photos make you believe   Very close to the U bahn station great area Delicious breakfast coffee at the cafes nearby

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: For a 4 star hotel the parking is a disappointment since it is not included in the price What is more the hotel does not have its own parking spots Considering that it is located in the center of Vienna free street parking spots are very difficult to find The only option left is an underground parking near the hotel but it costs almost 30 EUR per day

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Ordered taxivan via hotel to AirPort for 6 persons and 6 suitcases A small taxi arrived Staf of hotel not helpfull and rude So we had to take two taxi s without any compensation or apologies   Big room Good facilities

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: As I wrote during our reservation I would appreciate quite room with a bath Unfurtunately there was a broken shower water everywhere and one non isolated door to the hall other rooms have two   Very nice hotel next to Sch nbrunn Palace Park Breakfast was really good Subway stop bars restaurants within grasp

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Was not greeted in a welcoming way it was as if we were an inconvenience One section looks modernised and new however if you were like us and on the other side of the hotel you would be quite disappointed   Good location if you wanted to go to the zoo Although you are a distance from the city centre there conveniently is a metro stop across the road

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The attitude of the personal when we came they cheated on us and provided the wrong room which was worse then we booked It was absolutely not the room we wanted The lady from reception didn t want to change the room without adding some money When we started to search for another hotel she accidentally found out that there was one vacant room for us Our room wasn t cleaned for two days despite the note on the door open for cleaning There was no dental kit shampoo and conditioner slippers and bathrobe the hotel with 4 stars should have it all The balcony was very dirty with spiders and dust but the view was pretty so we tried not to notice this disadvantage   The hotel is a real palace Wonderful hall and beautiful building The location is good a lot of shops and restaurants nearby and the subway station is very close to the hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: I have no complaints  The hotel has been transfrormed since we stayed there about 20 years ago It is beautifully appointed The room we stayed in was very large The toilet was separate from the bathroom a distinct advantage The staff were polite and helpful Although the hotel is not centrally located it is very easy to travel to the centre by the nearby underground train service in just a few minutes The entrance to the grounds of Schonbrunn Palace is diametrically facing the hotel I would not stay anywhere else if I were to visit Vienna again

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The hotel manager checked us in and had this been a holiday inn I would say he is doing ok but for this hotel my expectation is to be treated nicely and with a smile I might put it as a bad day but again he helped us when we departed and same sour attitude Maybe it is cultural but less than I expect   Location is excellent and hotel appearance is very nice

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: We were given an upgrade which was great and told that we would have a view of the garden When we saw the view we were looking against another building We were wondering what kind of view we would have gotten if we didn t get an upgrade The breakfast is not worth your money there are enough places to get a sit down breakfast or a breakfast to go in the area   The location is great it is a 5 minute walk to Palace Sch nbrunn and to the nearest metrostation The staff was very friendly and upon arriving we got free public transport tickets that other guests had left at the reception after leaving Also the two congi rges I saw were very kind and helpfull with any question I had The pillow I had was not enough for me to have a comfortable sleep after requesting an extra pillow it was brought to my room in no time

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Very expensive breakfast room view was just not great overall appearance of rooms were a bit worn   Very close to Schonbrunn palace Hiezling station walkable breakfast options very close

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Very comfortable beds we were 4 ladies in 2 adjacent ground floor rooms with A small terrace overlooking the Courtyard Gardens with Wasserbrunnen water Fountain loved sitting out in the evening enjoying a glass or two of Groovy That s what the English People call the Gr ner Vetliner Loved the ambiance in the Hotel Bar also very welcoming

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Tourist trap you believe you are going to sleep in a palaace and the hotel rooms are in an adjacent building making you feel like you are in dorms  Breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: There was nothing not to like  This is a great hotel at a fair fee if you want to stay away from or don t need to be in the busy Vienna city centre yet it is only a couple of kilometers from the centre of Vienna which is not a large city by any standard The hotel is virtually next door to the Schoenbrunn palace but if you need night entertainment well I only strayed for one night and the Biergarten nearby served me perfectly

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The hotel was in a great location near both the tram and underground station making getting around so easy The hotel staff were so helpful and only too happy to help The room was large and very comfortable The bonus was the hotel is just yards away from the entrance to the wonderful gardens of the Schonbrunn palace

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: nothing   Great location for the Schonbrunn Palace and Gardens Hotel 50 m away from tram and underground terminus taking you straight into city centre Large room booked an executive room and well worth it

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: A very pleasant light airy hotel Friendly staff calm and very helpful The room was extremely comfy and the bathroom magnificent Breakfast was well presented with everything we could want and all very tasty Wifi excellent Altogether we had a very enjoyable stay

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No electric kettle for coffee in the room  Good location near train station and schonbrunn palace We just book 1 night so went by train to Vienna when arrived then go schonbrunn next morning Glad chosen this hotel instead for hotel in Vienna

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: In general hotel personnel especially some receptionists are helpful and they care some are very good but sometimes this is not the case For example housekeeping maid took the used water glasses in the morning and they were not replaced with the clean ones In the evening we called reception they immy switched to room service after a detailed explanation that we don t need tea just empty glasses they promised to bring ones but nothing followed Room cleaning quality very much depends on the house keeping maid who does the room cleaning at this very day   Advantages Very good location near Schoenbrunn Palace at the same time it takes only 10 15 minutes to get to Vienna city center by subway Quiet spatial trendy room good beds window is facing inner garden no transport noise tonight we had de luxe room category other room categories are also good Good breakfast

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No telephone in our room mixed excuses given as to why no tea coffee facility in room  Excellent breakfast choices great location right next to Schonnbraun Palace gardens

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: It s time to repair the rooms in the main building Standard rooms transferred to deluxe sucks Stop deceiving people The staff offered to pay extra for changing my deluxe room to a deluxe room in the main building The staff is polite but he does not care what the client is left with Several times I went to this hotel and I think it is time to change it I do not recommend it to anyone   It s time to repair the rooms in the main building Standard rooms transferred to deluxe sucks Stop deceiving people The staff offered to pay extra for changing my deluxe room to a deluxe room in the main building The staff is polite but he does not care what the client is left with Several times I went to this hotel and I think it is time to change it I do not recommend it to anyone

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Breakfast was bad and is definetly not worth the money   Location was good hotel is nice and clean Rooms are big and spacious Employees are really friendly and helpful We enjoyed our stay at this hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: They only have the one Cafe restuarant the food is a little hit and miss But there are plenty of other eating places in the area   Luxurious I had to check the booking email to confirm I had the right place Wow This place is great We have stayed at a lot of hotels and I think this is one of the better stays we had The location is a little out of the centre of town but near the Schronbrunn Palace grounds My wife enjoyed walking around the nearby shops Easy to pop into Vienna city area from the mtero

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The bed turned out to be 2 singles made up separately and placed together Very odd but still comfortable The Nachos was just Corn Chips Salsa dip no sour cream no avocado That s my only real criticism   This is the place to go if you really want to impress your wife The ambience was wonderful The decor was very fitting with the Palace grounds being just across the road We could not have asked for a more perfect hotel Close to the Metro for easy access to anywhere in Vienna Great local cafe s restaurants and shopping

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Old style furnitures old mattresses not too comfortable room service not in the morning bathroom not so in line for a 4 star hotel hygiene products included   Metro station very close to the hotel and many restaurants in the neighborhood Kind staff huge rooms Classy bar and restaurant with good service good food and fair prices

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: There is nothing I dislike This is just a suggestion I suggest that an electric kettle should be provided in each room although we were provided with one when we made a request It is nice to have a cup of tea at night or an early morning cup of coffee right inside the comfort of your room   The room and toilet are very clean The bed is very comfortable as well All the amenities in the room are almost new and in good condition Also we want to thank the hotel management for upgrading our accommodation at no additional cost It really was a bonus and a blessing

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: This time it was not the best few out of our window the bathroom is still hahaha very tiny  I like the beautiful and traditional atmosphare of the hotel combined with modern standard in the rooms

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Attitude of bar staff whi shouted across room that we could not sit in seats we had chosen because they were reserved at 11pm We took our drinks to our room No drink making facilities in room Arrived on a Sunday eve having traveled 9 hours by train only to find Radio Wien had taken over the hotel and restaurant did not open until 9PM We went elsewhere   Comfy rooms Quiet space where we were located Breakfast the best

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No breakfast was served When we arrived we waited for a while for help with the luggage And a lady from reception came Though emancipation is good heavy luggage should not be carried by females I felt awful when she was doing that Parking is public and expensive Probably due to touristic place The rooms were modest and pretty small We had those in 4000 ies section There are different sections though   Close to Schonbrunn Metro is 5min walk This building was built as a guest palace for guests of the imperor Nice interior in the lobby

Full_Review: No tea kettle in the room Bathroom basin sink not working properly Floor carpet too old and spotty Floors make lot of squeaking noise Breakfast is too pricy Restaurant does not provide lot of options to eat   Room is quite spacious Location wise pretty good Friendly staffs Good bar

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

Full_Review: 1 Even though I thoroughly booked with a mail a car to wait for me and my family at my arrival at Vienna hotel it did not appear The explanation I got later at the hotel reception desk Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Very nice safe area and really great hotel Imperial Vienna is still living in this neighborhood Big rooms few steps to metro U4 line city Zoo and Schonbrunn palace park Free parking area around hotel as well as nice bars and restaurants Your metro ride to the city center is 15 minutes Perfect hotel for couples and family with small children

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Room a bit dated breakfast and cafe expensive compared to nearby places  Location and value for money was impressive We had breakfast elsewhere a lot cheaper though Room a little dated but massive clean and there was nothing missing

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Requested iron from receptionist however need to pick by myself which opposite the road   Spacious clean comfy bed clean and spacious bathroom English speaking receptionist overall the hotel give me very good service

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The room we booked was a standard double It was nothing like the photos old bad furniture stains on the carpet and had not properly been cleaned for a long time there was dust on surfaces and fittings However the worst was the bed As is not uncommon in Austria the double bed was two queen sized beds pushed together which was not a problem The issue was the mattresses we have never slept on softer and less comfortable mattresses anywhere no support at all just a hole to sink into The pillows were thin and offered no support either even with two together We had the most uncomfortable night s sleep ever and both woke up with back pain In the morning we complained and were offered the choice of a room upgrade at Euro 10 per night where we were assured that the beds would be better Alternatively they said we could move to another room of the same standard which might have different mattresses We were not prepared to pay extra for a better room a comfortable mattress should be a given for any room in a supposed 4 star hotel so looked at the alternative room offered While the mattresses appeared somewhat firmer the room was tired with stains on the floor and damaged furniture We therefore cancelled our further three nights and moved to a similarly priced hotel elsewhere which we were very happy with As we were leaving the concierge told us that we should have known what to expect if we booked a budget room presumably he meant a dirty tired room and an uncomfortable bed We have travelled a lot all over the world at reasonably priced hotels and have stayed at many hotels in Vienna This was without doubt the most disappointing overall hotel experience we have ever had What we expected to be a good value weekend in a lovely hotel turned out to be something very different Even a budget room Euro 90 per night in this case so hardly the cheapest should be clean and comfortable   Location

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The first night we were placed in the other part of the hotel which for the price we paid was not sufficient The employees however moved us to us the second day   One s we were switched to the main building we had less noise and a great view Really great and accessible location

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Excellent room very clean and with a great view The hotel is very close to the underground station therefore a good starting point for touring Vienna

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The staffs told my husband that we have to pay 20 Euros each for iron and water kettle if we wanted them But this is just small matter so nvm   I really like almost everything in this hotel The staffs were great the room was spacious and comfortable have mini balcony really close to the train station and schonbrunn palace the hotel has nice neighbourhood and views The wifi connection was so so in the room but so fast in the lobby So I can just casually rest at the lobby and use the wifi Not to mention the Austrian people that we ve met there are really nice and helpful Such a great experience we have there

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Great clean and spacious rooms in main building knowledgeable and kind staff great breakfast Schonbrunn castle in walking distance and direct city center access via tram just in front of the hotel Value for money

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The price of the breakfast The food served at the breakfast was good plenty of choice but we felt that the price was too high 19 euros each and certainly not worth such a high cost We therefore only had breakfast on the first morning and after that we ate at a local bakers cafe just along the street For this reason we give the hotel a score of 9 5 10 But don t let this put you off staying here   We loved this hotel An excellent location very close to the railway station which was only a 2 minute walk away Very handy for reaching the centre of the city in approx 10 minutes The surrounding area is very nice with some good restaurants and shops We particularly liked the Japanese restaurant which is just along the street from the hotel The hotel s restaurant serves beautiful food and we enjoyed a very relaxing evening there The hotel bar is also very good A super place to unwind and relax with very attentive staff and good music Our room was beautiful spotlessly clean and the bed was superb Everything about the bathroom was great and there was constant hot water The reception staff were all very helpful and friendly We would highly recommend this hotel and would certainly return Excellent value for money

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Only have 1 pillow for one person I would prefer at least 2 pillows Also the pillow stuff is thin maybe a bit more pillow stuff But that s just me   Everything is OK except for the pillow but thats just me

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Size of my room but really not a complaint as price I got it for was brill  Like the location and restaurants around the area Great bar Irish bar Great transport to the city beside the palace Great location and good hotel Brekkie is good but not 19euro pp Just to left or right is brekkie places

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: 1 Looking at the hotel I had the impression that the hotel has seen better days in the past The room furtniture was a bit worn out the service was slow 2 Probably the shortcoming of every large hotel absence of any personal touch it seamed for me also that the hotel is used for mass tourist group just for 1 2 nights which of course does not make the hotel personnel to be more welcoming 3 The evening restaurant in the hotel is rather pricy and the food is not someting special There are hundreds of places in Vienna where you can eat really good Not recommended   1 Location Our target was Schoenbrunn so from this point of view the choice of this hotel was just great as Schoenbrunn is located around the corner verbatim It is also very easy to go to the center of Vienna as the metro station is located very close to the hotel The area called Hitzing around the hotel ias also very nice to walk and very green I suppose in spring and summer as we stayed in January 2 We had the spacious room big enough for the family 3 Breakfast was good good choice of dishes 4 The hotel is located in the beatuful historical building

Full_Review: The bed is very uncomfortable I have a back ache in the morning The pillow is only one which is very thin and uncomfortable Usually if the hotel is 4 star it includes at least 2 comfortable pillows and bed No complimentary tea or coffee in the room No small shampoo or soap in the bathroom The lady who clean the room just pass by and just put the toilet paper The room is not clean and tidy What is the idea of coming in and showing that you clean and actually is not cleaned and tidy   The staff are good The room is spacious

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: We had problems with the first room we were given and it took 24 hours to resolve Not impressed with the response from reception customer facing staff The first room we were given had foul odour of damp and bathroom shower drain smelt very badly Upon reporting the smell the reception staff agreed to move us without question but the hotel was fully booked so we were told we had to wait 24 hours to be moved The reception staff were out of any other options solutions to the long wait other than suggesting a room spray which was frustrating More frustrating was that reception staff refused to come inspect the room despite our insistence Felt that the reception staff were not interested in understanding the problem or it s causes despite asking us to sit tight for 24 hours Once moved the second room was fine   Hotel is located in very pleasant suburb but with quick and easy access to city centre Schonbrunn has some sights as well Hotel located close to U4 and trams Room had its own outdoor seating area overlooking courtyard which was very pleasant We had problems with the first room but the second was ok Impressions were that the rooms were fairly standard hotel rooms but nothing too remarkable Rooms were very quiet Good fast wi fi Hotel ballroom was a good entertainment space and catering was good Some of the portering staff went out of their way to help find us an ironing board due to lack of pressing service over weekends

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

Full_Review: Underground and Trams just 2 minute walk 5 minutes for Sch nbrunn Palace and Zoological park Easy access to market area and restaurant Just 5 minutes on foot

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Cannot think of any negatives   We were impressed when we had a problem with the lights in our room and we were immediately moved to another room The staff were very friendly and helpful We were there for a concert at the Schonbrunn Palace all we had to do was cross the road outside and we were in the beautiful Schonbrunn Gardens perfect

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Spacious room general areas and breakfast restaurant Near U bahn and trams and very easy access to Sch nbrunn and zoo Breakfast was versatile and with good quality Friendly staff Would stay again

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No swimming pool sauna or Gym Also expensive onsite parking   Excellent location Right next to Schonburn Palace Very nice property with a lot of space

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The water in the bathroom always changed from super hot to ice cold  Great location next to Sch nbrunn Castle We had an executive room which was very big

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The staff at breakfast can t keep up with replenishing the food available The omelette chef disappeared for a long period and there was no way of signalling my presence while I was waiting for an omelette Extra pillow as standard   Breakfast choices were good The bar staff were great

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No air condition in the rooms given away through Booking com The staff at the Reception and at the Bar were both very unpolite and unprofessional Billing was a problem as well   Location is superb though

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The hotel has become way too large There are now five buildings and it was too long of a walk to the lobby After 2 weeks in cozy hotels around Austria this was cold and impersonal Also the traffic in front of the hotel was so heavy that the exhaust fumes kept us from sitting out on the terrace The hotel itself was clean and comfortable and the food was good   The hotel is neat and clean and close to the beautiful Sch nbrunn Palace The breakfast buffet was great

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: We hated the long institutional looking corridors The garden which has huge potential was very disappointing Some interesting planting tables comfortable chairs umbrellas regular maintenance would create a very relaxing oasis This should also increase potential for additional sales of food drinks Location across the road from Schonbrunn close to ubahn was excellent   Reception staff were very friendly welcoming helpful Breakfast was good beds were very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: no sparkling wine for breakfast as last time room price somewhat high  attentive staff spacious room with wooden floor nice common space possibility of outdoor breakfast

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The location to city center was far There was no toiletries in the shower area No trash can in the bathroom Breakfast was not included with room No coffee maker in the room The getelmen who helped us with our luggage was very unfriendly and strange hair dryer was not working When we needed it   The room was very clean and comfortable Situated across from the palace

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: I noticed that the front door the wooden brown door in the middle of the building the main entrance at the time of Emperor Franz Josef needs some painting and polishing   I liked the breakfast very much even though I did not have croissants

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: 1 Creaky parquet in all rooms We have been there with baby who woke up every time 2 Laundry service is not good My T shirt was damaged two holes from stapler in the visible area   1 Location is great 2 Good parking for high vehicles with carwash facilities 3 Spacious rooms for reasonable price

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: More information could be provided for the tourist   The staff were friendly and welcoming especially Lisa Everything we needed was provided I would stay here again The hotel is very grand and impressive

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Attitude of reception staff who did not want to allow me to unload luggage from our car at the front of the hotel I did it anyway The porter was especially helpful When I attempted to get breakfast the service was poor We were ignored The staff chose to serve others who came in after us and then proceeded to clear the tables rather than take our order In the event we chose to go next door for breakfast where the service was excellent The reception staff were not very informative on our arrival choosing to tell us to read everything rather than talk to us about anything   Location close to Schunbrun Palace and park Luxury of hotel Porter assistance

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The one gentleman at the front desk initially who was a little dismissive His female colleagues were kind  They kindly moved us to a room closer to the lobby which was very helpful for my husband We appreciated it

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: There were no tea of coffee making facilities in the room   Good location Clean and comfortable Excellent buffet breakfast We would use the hotel again on a future visit

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: our hotel room was juat right for us a little bit basic compared to the grand design of the hotel The only negative was that our bathroom was quite small   very beautiful grand hotel looks like a 5 hotel as soon as you walk in to the lobby it has a real wow factor staff were very friendly and attentive always happy to help

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The dust on the radiator in the bathroom No hovering done in the room in five days we were there or tidying of the room only the bed was made No facecloth No hand lotion in toilet area the bottle was empty No sky TV Noise constantly in the room from air conditioning boiler Radiators on in 26 degrees of heat outside  The bed was comfy

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No tea and coffee facilities in the room insufficient staff in the bar at night there was a football match on television lots of people and we could not get served   The room was comfortable and quiet and the location next to the park was excellent

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Service of tea or coffee at breakfast at the table Collecting hot water and jugs of milk much better to have it served and there would have been a substantial saving in waste   The bed was very comfortable and the rooms were good Pleasant staff willing to help will make a second visit

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No tea and coffe facilities in the room  Location close to underground and trams Also able to walk in Palace park across the road great for an evening stroll after dinner open 6 20 21 00

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The bathroom was ridiculously small it was like walking into a cupboard There were no amenities just squeeze bottles of liquid soap in the shower and sink This doesn t seem appropriate for a four star hotel The toilet didn t look clean and there was hair in the drawer The bath was high and it was difficult to get in and out to have a shower We were expecting some luxury and got a basic room We waited 25 minutes to get a soft boiled egg made at breakfast and an omelette which wasn t even cooked properly We were very disappointed in this hotel as we were expecting some level of luxury due to the price we paid We didn t get this at all At checkout we weren t even farewelled or asked how our stay was

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Take your breakfast at the Schlosscafe if you settle for a good and healthy Austrian breakfast Quality and location are excellent and less then half of the price Take a walk through the park of Schloss Sch nbrunn on you re way to the city or back to the hotel only 1 stop away taking the U4 line

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No tea and coffee c facilities in room  Just across the road from the schoenbrun palace garden Very comfortable Used to be the emperors guesthouse Still some chandeliers and painted ceilings in reception Close to center by public transport

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Nothing   Fantastic location the breakfast is full of protein choices to keep us full until dinner super clean rooms and facilities excellent restaurant within easy walking distance of hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: It was for my 60th birthday and on arrival we were informed that they had given us a free up grade to a junior suite The room was massive with a private balcony with a view over schonbrunn palace park On my birthday they left a card and arrangement of fruit which was a very nice touch Would definitely go back

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The carpet of the room was extremely dirty They advertise views to the garden and the garden in my room was some wild grass very far from a garden   Breakfast location

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Nothing not to like   The location was superb easy walking distance to shopping eating and tourist attractions Extremely easy to get to from Vienna airport on public transport too The hotel itself was fantastic spacious rooms super clean bathrooms wonderful breakfast Hard to find any fault

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Guests please be aware that this hotel extends to private functions and on certain days of the year you cannot get access to the restaurant or bar No note in room to for warn guests   Martin in the Glorietta bar was a really welcoming and attentive bar person We would highly recommend the Della Lucia restaurant just a few doors away from the hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Breakfast rather expensive Good to have option of cafe within hotel Generally couldn t fault anything though   Lovely hotel in pleasant out of city centre location 15 min by metro to central Vienna Felt v safe location with nice cafes close by Staff v helpful particularly on reception V comfortable room

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The aircon seemed to be on permanently but was quickly rectified It did seem like a business hotel with a large convention on I think the parking situation is a bit odd and could be better sorted out Not very clear labelling on where the parking drop off is I had to go in and ask at reception and I was still not told about the easiest way Even where the reception is is not clear   Great location for the zoo and Schonbrunn Good breakfast I booked an exec room and we got an upgrade to a bigger room which was lovely in the old part of the hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Breakfast not included in the high room rate Also need to refine finer touches like bathroom soaps coffee in bedrooms   Well located close to Schonbrunn easy access to metro to city Nice area Reception staff very friendly helpful

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The hotel was vey clean and beds super compfortable exactly what you need after a long walking day very well connected with the underground transport as well

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No Snacks Toast served in Hotel Bar after 11 p m   Impressive and spacy breakfast room rich Buffet with Eggs prepared to your order very friendly reception desk Easy to reach by car very close to subway station as well as Sch nbrunn gardens and Zoo

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Would have liked tea coffee facilities in room Requested a pot of tea from room service which did not materialise Confused over beds single beds but pushed together with king size headboard so we would have preferred a king size quilt but not available so settled for extra single quilt   Stayed here for 6 days and travelled by train Reception on arrival at 9 30pm was very good including help from porter who was friendly and helpful Staff had good english and were very informative and helpful Breakfast is superb and well worth the money We requested extra pillows and extra quilt and got them the following day Problem with the safe was dealt with very quickly Quiet room as requested overlooking the hotel garden Excellent location with metro and Schonbrunn nearby and some good restaurants within walking distance including a beer hall Good for an evening concert at the orangery Schonbrunn

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: nothing  Very helpful staff good location I ve stayed 3 nights at this hotel and it was really convenient to visit the palace and Gloriette hill everyday The subway station is about 3 minutes away from hotel and you can reach the center in about 15 to 20 minutes Also there are plenty of good restraurants and shops nearby

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Hotel needs a bit of a face lift   Very convinient near the metro location Stayed just one night while in transit Perfect for my short stay Price definitely attractive Not a bargain but close

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: This hotel is located out of the Vienna link but easy access using the U4 20 min from Landstrasse station connected to the MITTE station Very clean and confortable room with a good view of the garden I like staying at this hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The Deluxe room was not deluxe we upgraded to the Executive which was more what we were expecting   The room was lovely and spacious with a delightful view of the Schonbrunn grounds

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No negatives   The service during the stay and after was excellent I left a number of things in the room which were mailed back promptly The room was excellent with view to the center nature area Lighting was good and the bathroom setup well for makeup

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: There was no kettle in the room to make coffee or tea whenever The toilets were not cleaned up to the mark But overall it was a comfortable stay   The location was really good

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Not a thing   Staff were very friendly and helpful especially the bar man Room was beautiful and with the view of the garden would be amazing in summer

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: A room was dirty We found someone s t shirt there we booked a room for 2 night every morning between 9 10 am the hotel staff came to our room though we hanged a notice not to disturb On reception they couldn t explain that So never ever again to this place  Room size

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: We here in the USA use hand wash clothes to wash our face use in bath shower etc The hotel would save money by placing hand wash clothes in bath rooms much cheaper to wash and clean than a long hand towel which was the only thing we had to use   All of the above

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: A little bit closer to the centre would have been nice but you have an U bahn station close by  Everything Is a great hotel with incredible service and fantastic accomodations

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Nice small Hotel very European style the staff was amazing and helpful the room was big very clean and comfy Metro is very near and one of the Schoenbrun Palace entrances is jut 50 mts away Have nice cafes around to have breakfast if you not want to have it in the Hotel Wifi is free in the room

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Upon arrival the reception staff was very rude and unhelpful When we asked the man at the reception to check it he went through the usual procedure and then gave us the room keys and waved his hand towards the general direction of the room No explanation about the hotel no breakfast times no map of the city nothing Turns out he had given us the wrong room category and we had to go back and explain that we had booked the higher category He said no we hadn t even though I was holding the reservation confirmation right in front of him For some reason he thought we were lying He then referred us to his colleague without apologizing Luckily his colleague gave us the right room and was friendlier but no helpfulness over the hotel facilities or city information The price does not include breakfast which is also a little unpractical having to find places nearby   The hotel itself our room Executive Room and its history were incredible It was probably one of the nicest rooms I ve stayed in Very large clean and quiet rooms except for the church bell across the street which gave a nice atmosphere It is across the street and a ten minute walk through the gardens from Sch nbrunn Palace While it s very convenient for that it s about 15 20 minutes on the U Bahn from the city center I would go back to this hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: No ramp for luggage in 4 hotel in Wien The tub didn t work the cleaning woman said that it s impossible to repair it s ok for the 2nights stay As the hotel is the old historical building consider you ll hear everything and everybody maybe it s just only in some parts of the hotel Anyway as we stayed just 2nights and we came Bach to the hotel just to sleep it was ok   The hotel s located next to the public transport and the zoopark Low price A very good breakfast with a huge variety of the excellent quality products and with the excellent service even if it s a bit overpriced 19 person I was with my 5yo child who was free of charge so I could consider the price of the breakfast as a 9 5 person In Any other bar in the city with the same quality quantity you ll pay much more They gave us the room earlier than the checking time The reseption staff one Spanish guy was very friendly and the girl who done a checkout on the 30th of dec was friendly Other guys at the desk were like a robot

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The breakfast is very expensive and with the good alternatives close by the hotel does not encourage to have breakfast in the hotel  Very good location near to the underground station Room was good spacious and clean and sound proof

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Dirty curtains but except this wonderful   It s like living in a Palace Executive room main building One of the best hotels I ve ever stayed High ceilings nice balcony view extremely spacious Design is amazing

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The downside of the huge old style windows was that isolation is not good as expected so if you have a room facing Sch nbrunn you will hear everything that happens in the street like the tram the cars the Church which is close by etc which makes for a very early wakeup Also the isolation regarding temperature is not good standing next to the balcony with the doors closed you could still feel the breeze coming from under the door One other surprising aspect was the cleaning the cleaning ladies came did the cleaning but did not touch an empty bottle of Cola which was on the table for 3 days Also a blouse that was on a chair laid there for 3 days although it would have been a small effort to fold it and put it at least on the chair properly something you would expect from n hotel like this   Very nice hotel beautiful old style Viennese next door to Sch nbrunn and with a nice view of it from the window The room was nice high ceiling and huge windows nice big bed and furnished accordingly in the old Viennese style which fitted perfectly with the ambiance and the atmosphere Very close to subway with direct link to the center Karlsplatz Opera and easy also to find when coming going to the airport

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: This hotel s location is excellent right next to Schonbrunn Palace and a subway stop The building is elegant the room was spacious comfortable and the bathroom was very well appointed We dined at the restaurant at the hotel it was wonderful We would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Nothing but 19 euros for breakfast was a no from the off Good places to eat locally for a lot less and with a good atmosphere   Comfy beds hot shower quiet room In a good area with shops and places to eat Very close to the Hietzing U bahn station and the Schonbrunn Palace Good access to the city centre and all the Christmas markets

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The cheapest rooms are too old and very poor For 1 night stay acceptable   If you want to visit Schonbrunn location is super Otherwise if you want to walk around the center better to choose another location

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Don t trust the picutures they have on the site The hotel manager or one of her colleague didn t want to solve that we asked for an another room I ve asked and asked and asked and after 15 minutes she was propitious to show us an another one It s a ridiculous hotel   It s in the neighborhood of Sch nbrunn Castel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Display of direction to the rooms using many room numbers and arrows is not always easy to figure out It is possible to find an underware piece of previous guest in the bathroom   Quiet Location

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Parking for 1 5 days costed 50 EURO Seems too expensive though it depends   We choose Superior room It was really huge and awesome 4 meters in hight and neary 40 sq m of luxury Soft drinks for free Schonbrunn palace is 10 min walk Metro 3 min walk Hotel is really splendid

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: that i had to leave  This hotel is nicely located next to Schoenbrunn it takes 10 min from city center to the hotel by public transport Staff very friendly and efficient room was gorgeous with terrace same bathroom huge bathtube etc Ill be there again

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The hotel itself is super charming I love the hardwood floors chandeliers and high ceilings It felt like staying at the Schloss Schonbrunn itself I also really enjoyed the little details the free drink vouchers access to the minibar we received free softdrinks and robes slippers These small touches made the hotel stand out

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The cleaning should be done more seriously 2 days after our arrival we have discovered a dirty pair of man s underwear on a shelf in our wardrobe Also we were spoiled by the hotel with a cup of chocolate but despite the fact we have drunk it in our first day in Wien the emply and dirty cup was in our room for the rest of our holiday for 5 days long The parking is possible only at an underground garage right next to the hotel but the fee is high   I loved the position of the hotel right at the entrance in the Schonbrunn park and the history of the building a former palace for Franz Josef s guests I liked the generous size of the room and its bed The personnel was very friendly and willing to give support

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Perhaps a lack of amenities usual in a hotel of its quality eg spa gym or pool   Brilliant location close to the Schoenbrun Park Palace with fast transport into the centre Spacious rooms large open public areas Very pleasant to relax in their Kaffeehaus

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Car park charges of 24 a day no easy alternative  The location is great except for parking Staff OK cleaners very friendly and nice Rooms very good quiet clean and large enough

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Some rooms facing the street are a bit noisy The curtains to not block enough light from coming through the windows so if you need a dark room to sleep well this might not be your favourite place If you come by car it is not easy to arrive and and reach check in in particular if you have luggage since the parking space in front of the hotel is always occupied by other vehicles   Very beautiful facilities elegant and smart

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: As the Hotel is located a main street it is nice to have a room with a courtyard view   Great Location across the street from Schonbrunn Palace The U Bahn is also just a few steps away from the hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: It is nice hotel A great staff of personals helpful and fun Nice room with nice balcony Good wifi The location is exactly as i needed it It is best value for price Thanks

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: There is no pedestrian crossing at the front entrance and the hotel is on a busy road   Everything The wifi is the best I have ever had in any hotel in any country I travel extensively My room was enormous and extremely comfortable It was luxurious and tasteful

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Breakfast expensive and not included in room price   Location close to Sch nbrunn not at City Center but well connected via train room was spacious and one of the few silent ones

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Insufficient bathing supplies No shampoo or cotton tips for example Containers to squeeze to obtain soap were very difficult to handle  Location breakfast large room helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Not the best restaurant experience inside the hotel We had an early dinner and even though the restaurant had only three tables with guests the service was horrible We felt the young waiter was unsuitable on the two occasions we ate in the hotel Our mistake for going back as the hotel is surrounded by very good restaurants Breakfast was very good though with friendly staff This being said I will give the hotel another try Everyone has a bad day or two and most everything else was excellent   Lovely safe neighbourhood across from Schonbrunn palace ideal for evening walks dining and shopping Transportation across the street 10 15 minutes from downtown Lovely hotel Very friendly front desk

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Standard rooms are very basic no frills bit like being in a travel lodge whereas the newly decorated deluxe ones are lovely can t believe they re the same hotel

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The WC and bathroom were separate in the room And WC had no wash basin and garbage bin Entry to parking area is from only 1 building So we had to walk a long distance by changing 2 elevators   The Location and the reception staff was helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Not a central location but with the amazing Vienna public transportation system that is not necessary In the meantime it is near one of Vienna s best tourist attractions Super classy hotel at a reasonable price

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Excellent hotel whilst not city centre well located and easy tram an u bahn line station nearby Our room was comfortable and had a small balcony onto the rear garden Superb buffet breakfast and very efficient amiable staff The immediate area is very pleasant with a number of good cafes and restaurants

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: the only real gripe was that the air conditioning automatically switches off when the outdoor air temperature reaches 15 degrees but the room was still warm and stuffy all night Then you have to open the window and get woken by the church bells at 7am   Great location and nice modern hotel There were some sparkly fixtures and fittings and a bit of faded grandeur in the ballroom Fairly standard stuff but fine for my purposes

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The rooms were a bit overly warm which made sleeping more difficult than it should ve been   Location was good for my conference clean very well maintained and nice decor

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: The room was dirty and smelly We asked an upper floor room and got a ground foor At 7 45 the chambermaid wanted to clean to room than came back at 08 30 again

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: if you re taking the single room with no bathroom don t stay for more than two days there is no shower avaiable NO SOUND ISOLATION AT ALL I didnt sleep well because of other people noise   the wifi worked very well at least on the first floor the bed was ok staff quite helpfull

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Overall the accommodations were very comfortable not quite a complaint but we thought that the bathroom was a bit small   The location across from the Schonbrunn Palace gardens was spectacular The gardens were open until dusk and a great place to take a walk after a tiring day Because of the excellence of and access to transit the location a little removed from the hustle and bustle of the center was perfect

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Well located to transport and city sights particularly the Palace Good to be able to leave bags on final day to enjoy further sightseeing Clean and tidy with good WIFI and no extras

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Only bad thing was the scrambled eggs at the breakfast buffet But there were so many choices it didn t make a difference   This hotel was absolutely amazing You feel like royalty in the Executive Rooms The staff did their best to help me get a birthday card for my wife late at night even calling a card store owner at home Then the staff sent her a great fruit basket the next day for her birthday Absolutely stunning

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: extremely long corridors i would have preffered to have a view on the Schonbrunn gardens instead of room at the ground floor and no balcony at these price i have booked deluxe room for 100 eur night without breakfast i found out that the breakfast is 20 eur person quite expensive plus parking 20 day so 160 eur day total price not very close to the city center 6 subway stations about one hour walk  very nice place a real old palace near by Schonbrunn gardens entrance with one of the last real ballroom in Wien nice staff at the reception

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Four star hotel that has no aircondition in the room it was extremely hot and impossible to sleep Don t go there in summer   Beautiful property kind staff proximity to Schoennbrun

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Booked room was include breakfast but reception still ask us to pay the cost of breakfast back to home check confirmation of hotel is include break so I have to Complaint Booking group   Good WiFi Comfortable bed near Metro

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: There was a party going on in the hotel restaurant below one night and the loud music was a little annoying Traveling by car the parking did cost for our several nights stay 24 Euro a night   Wonderful location next to the Schonbrunn Palace we have taken a free walk in the palace garden everyday during our stay Many nice shops and restaurants around Also a minute walk to the metro station which access you easily to the city center in about 15 min The room bathroom were very spacious and clean nice furniture and the beds were comfortable Wifi is free and fast The breakfast had great selections and the staffs were supportive

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Location bad just that it is a long way out of the centre of Vienna But not a huge issue There is parking available for cars and bikes  Staff were very friendly and helpful Rooms were exceptional and food was delicious Location good and bad Good right outside the u4 metro line and near the Lindt chocolate shop zoo and park

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: A better airconditioner would have been nice and the toilet was a little claustrophobic   Loved being across the road from Schonbrunn Palace close to the train and restaurants The hotel itself is beautiful a very grand feeling

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: There are rooms in this 4 star hotel with no air conditioning I booked on booking dot com where a c isn t mentioned in the room description but then again neither is toilet paper One would just expect this to be a basic facility at a 4 star hotel A very snotty person in charged told me that it is only logical that if it is not mentioned it s not present They gave us room 1118 where the a c went on at 3am with a huge noise and after 2 visits to the front desk it was turned off since there was no way to turn it off in the room My thanks to Mr Ismir with a much politer attitude than his colleague   I stayed here 3 days prior and gave this hotel an excellent rating Great location great value great facilities etc thus changed dramatically on my second visit except for the location

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: I booked online some time ago paying in GBP the EURO value has dropped the difference refund would be nice The hotel car park doesn t give multi day parking discounts to hotel guests Breakfast not included in hotel booking price   Good location Easy to use public transport to the City Center Ideal location to take walks in the park and visit the zoo

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien
Full_Review: Breakfast is a bit pricey   We especially liked the location It is right next to the summer palace with its beautiful gardens On the opposite corner there is the underground station making it very easy to get around

Hotel_Name: Austria Trend Parkhotel Sch nbrunn Wien

The bed was so comfy and the decor in our room was very stylish The hotel bar was cheap so good for pre drinks and we were pointed in the direction of a lovely traditional Austrian restaurant top of the road then round the corner Also 10 minutes walk to the underground so not long from centre of Vienna at all We didn t bother with breakfast because at 15 Euro a head we could get it cheaper elsewhere but overall this hotel was great value for money

My room was not very dark This was a problem because the Sun was rising very early during my trip However this was the only problem I had during my stay in this excellent hotel   Excellent staff and location The hotel is less than 5 min walking from a subway station and it is located in a very calm neighborhood The breakfast is also good I had a really good time and I definitely recommend this hotel

they can t accept customers until putting air condition as four star level hotel over 30 degree I can t stay room like sauna without air conditioning They provide air fan with 5 dollars deposit and feel humiliating by staffs When I need room key with magnetic plastic they request me another 5 dollars deposit it is the first time to ask for 5 euros deposit for extra key due to giving me only one key   free Wi Fi and free street parking due to away from the center of the city

Breakfast is too expensive   The hotel is located in very peaceful area within 7 min walk to the metro station that makes it s quite easy to get to the city centre The room was really big comfortable and clean

Wifi sometimes was poor but it was only three times during our stay so that is ok  This hotel is situated in 6 minutes from the underground station which goes direct to the city centre The trip to city centre takes 10 12 minutes It was a very nice price for the hotel with such location in Vienna The breakfast was very nice and was included in price for the room

one girl named Veladimir on the reception is ignorant and attitude with guest is not acceptable instead of guiding guest she tries to show norms and tries to undermine guest require hospitality course rest all staff was very good and friendly   Rooms comfort value for money and Cleaniness

The staff were welcoming on arrival and the lounge area was comfortable and there were stands with information about the various attractions in the City The room was huge and one side of it was a wall of windows looking out to the top of the Rijksmuseum straight ahead and down on the garden with glass pyramids which were lit up at night We would recommend the higher floors for the best views we were on the 6th The room was spacious and the bed large and very comfortable The bathroom had a full sized bath with a shower attached The TV was large and there was the usual tea coffee making facilities as well as a small fridge mini bar There was plenty of space in the wardrobes cupboards and there was an iron and ironing board not that we used it but it was a thoughtful addition to the facilities There was a fitness suite downstairs and ice making facilities down the corridor The Reception staff were cheerful friendly and very helpful even going online to book our return seats on the plane for us the day before we left Fortunately their English was very good as neither of us spoke any Dutch We found a number of restaurants locally over the other side of the canal and the Rijksmuseum and Van Gogh museum were both within a very short walk from the hotel in the other direction There were busses and trams not far away and apparently the bus usually stops even closer but there are some works going on to build a carpark under the canal so the bus stops a bit further away at the moment The works didn t disturb us at all We would definitely return to the nh Museum Quarter again

with dinner We entered the more relaxed bar for dinner and sat down and noticed everyone around us not too busy was receiving table service We waited and waited for someone to take our drink order no one even said hello After waiting 10 minutes my partner went to the bar and ordered our drinks and also requested a menu and advised the staff that we eating Our drinks were brought over to us while we decided what to eat Again we waited and waited and no one came to take our order even though we had been told that they would My partner again got up and tried to order a few moments later the supervisor came and took our order We ordered two pricey steaks I thought after this we would be taken more seriously We were warned of the 35 minute wait on food and this was fine When our food was brought to us I don t think that the waiter could have got away even faster if he tried We were offered no condiments at all My partner again had to get up and ask for salt I had ordered my steak medium rare I know this offends some people but I hate blood in my food This apparently offended the chef as my steak was more Medium Rare No one came to check if everything was okay with our food and the hotel the day we checked out

I chose the most expensive Executive Suite on Booking com to make sure the quality of the room for my boss I went there before to try to have a look but were refused which I could understand that the room was occupied by other guests I didn t go to the hotel again and insist to check the suite before because I trust Hilton But when I checked in I found it s not a real suite at all The suite is composed by two single rooms actually And the most ridiculous thing is that I got the room key from the bedroom which becasue it is nearer to the lift The bedroom is really small as others the space between the large bed and the TV is too narrow to turn around for a normal size adult And the door inside to the living room is too small to be recognised at first glance Therefore you can imagin when we opened the door and 7 people wanted to walk in the room followed my boss how embarrassed and upset and uncomfortable we were at that moment Obviously there is no enough space for us at all And there is no chance for us to sit down and to have a causal chat with my boss during his trip because we should pass by his private bedroom There is another door from the living room can be used only I knew it when I checked out three days later But the living room s door is far more away to the lift which you could not want to use it anymore It s the first time my boss went to London for a business trip after 10 hours direct flight I don t want to mention how disappointed and sad I was and how unsatisfied my boss was again Generally Hilton Hotel is what we trust and use all over the world But I will certainly not choose it in London next time

I didn t like that free wifi in room was not available to guests if the hotel was booked through Booking com even though I am a Hilton Honours member I was shocked and certainly not about to pay almost 13 a day for it That s total robbery Also no points would be attributed to my membership for the stay again because I booked through Booking com instead of the hotel website The rooms of this particular Hilton had a somewhat dated feel there were cracks around my doorway the bathroom was tiny and it just didn t feel as nice as other Hilton s I ve stayed at in London There were no bathrobes or slippers available in my room something I have come to expect from hotels of this standard   Hilton generally has good sized rooms compared to most London hotels and large very comfortable beds Room service options were tasty albeit a bit limited especially for breakfast Staff were very friendly and personable and the location was excellent for me as I was staying there for Notting Hill Carnival I liked that tea coffee are available in the room and the minibar is now available for use by guests as a mini fridge I wish I knew that ahead of time as I intended to walk with some meal items and thought I wouldn t have had access to a fridge Though the bathroom was small there was a decent amount of counter space to place my toiletries etc something you don t often get I liked the blackout curtains as well as that allowed me to sleep in a bit It was easy to travel from this location as it s between two main tube stations and there were ample black cabs available out front I used Uber a lot as well and it was always easy for them to find the hotel
